data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for preferred channel override at subscription level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'preferred channel override at subscription level', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm its existence or functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: Preferred channel override at subscription level is not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the preferred channel override requirement.
